data.name: Fresh Story
data.detailed_description:
Fresh Story is a visual novel about one girl's difficult journey. She will face difficulties and hard decisions to achieve a peaceful life as she dreamed.
Diana came from the suburbs to the big city to achieve success and a happy life with her boyfriend Archie. But can they get through all the temptations and stay true to each other?



You will make decisions that will affect her level of debauchery and relationships with different people.



Immerse her in the pleasures of the big city, or keep her chaste for her lover.

data.short_description: Fresh Story is a visual novel about one girl's difficult journey. She will face difficulties and hard decisions to achieve a peaceful life as she dreamed.Diana came from the suburbs to the big city to achieve success and a happy life with her boyfriend Vlad.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 法文, 簡體中文, 義大利文, 德文, 希臘文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 韓文, 土耳其文, 日文, 捷克文, 斯洛伐克語

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11 (32bit/64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11 (32bit/64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X Yosemite 10.10
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X Yosemite 10.10
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Microsoft® Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11 (32bit/64bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support

  • OS *: Microsoft® Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11 (32bit/64bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support
  • Storage: 2 GB available space

  • OS: OS X Yosemite 10.10
